dailyNews.title: YouTube Premium gets pricier as subscription costs rise in the US – Here's how much you have to pay now
dailyNews.description: YouTube has raised Premium subscription prices in the US, increasing costs for individual and family plans. The move comes amid wider streaming price hikes, though the platform has denied reports of longer unskippable ads.

dailyNews.title: Iran Unable to Find Mines in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. Says
dailyNews.description: The lost mines have prevented Iran from quickly complying with President Trump’s demand to allow more ships to pass through the waterway.

dailyNews.title: ‘I’m Fed Up.’ Frustrated With Trump, Starmer Embraces Other Allies.
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Britain is strengthening ties in Europe and the Middle East as the once-special relationship with America sours.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says First Lady ‘Had a Right’ to Talk About Epstein
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in an interview that he had known his wife wanted to address rumors about the late sex offender at some point, but that he had not known exactly what she would say.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Racing to Redefine ‘America First’ in a Time of War
dailyNews.description: Washington has been debating the thrust of Mr. Trump’s foreign policy for more than a decade, with the only consensus being that “America First” means whatever the president says it does.

dailyNews.title: Officials Release Design for 250-Foot Arch in Washington, as Trump Seeks Another Imprint
dailyNews.description: The president has proposed the arch, which would rise on a Washington roundabout across from the Lincoln Memorial, as a way to celebrate America’s 250th anniversary.

dailyNews.title: Potential Democratic 2028 Candidates Condemn Trump’s ‘War of Choice’ in Iran
dailyNews.description: At a convention in New York, several Democrats mulling presidential bids rallied around opposition to President Trump’s decision to attack Iran.

dailyNews.title: Burned Before, Democrats Abruptly Revive the Idea of Impeaching Trump
dailyNews.description: Democrats in Congress have assiduously avoided talk of a third impeachment of President Trump, concerned that it would distract from their midterm campaign message. That tide seems to have turned.

dailyNews.title: Trump Moves Top Aide James Blair to Political Operation Ahead of Midterms
dailyNews.description: Mr. Blair will “lead the charge from the outside,” the president said on social media. The move comes as Republicans are bracing for a potentially difficult November election.

dailyNews.title: New drawings show proposed "Arc de Trump"
dailyNews.description: The White House on Friday released new drawings of President Trump's proposed triumphal arch that will be located near Arlington National Cemetery. According to the drawings, the arch would stand 250 feet high, more than twice the height of the nearby Lincoln Memorial.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump's surprise statement on Epstein raises new questions
dailyNews.description: Questions are still swirling about why first lady Melania Trump decided to make a surprise statement Thursday denying any ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Caitlin Huey-Burns has more on the reaction to the first lady's comments.

dailyNews.title: Vance heads to Pakistan for peace talks as Trump issues new threats against Iran
dailyNews.description: As Vice President JD Vance is on his way to Pakistan for direct peace talks with Iran, President Trump issued new threats and demands Friday as a fragile ceasefire continues to hold. Ed O'Keefe reports from Washington.

dailyNews.title: JD Vance says he believes U.S.-Iran talks will be "positive" as he heads to Pakistan
dailyNews.description: President Trump expressed confidence on Friday as senior members of his administration prepared for in-person peace talks with Iran. Vice President JD Vance said he believed the negotiations will be "positive" before boarding his flight to Pakistan. CBS News political reporter Zak Hudak reports.
